visualization.description: Visualize your data in interactive charts. You can import an Excel file or extract data from PDF papers.

hero.title: Visualize your data
hero.description: Import an Excel file to inspect the dataset, compare axes, and export the data as CSV.

batchExtraction.title: Extract paper data from PDFs
batchExtraction.description: Drop one or more PDFs to generate a structured Excel export. The extraction process may take a few minutes depending on the number of papers.

dropzone.title: Drag and drop your Excel file here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse

status.success: Excel imported successfully. You can now adjust the axes or export the CSV.
status.error: We couldn't import that file. Please try another Excel file.

dropzone.title: Drag and drop your PDF papers here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse (up to 10 files supported)

extraction.processing: Extracting data from {count} paper(s), this can take a while...
extraction.success: PDFs processed successfully. Your Excel export has been downloaded.
extraction.partialSuccess: Some files could not be processed and were skipped. Your Excel export only includes the ones that succeeded.
extraction.error: We couldn't extract those PDFs. Please try again.
extraction.quotaExceeded: Gemini's free-tier quota has already been reached. Try again later or with fewer files.
extraction.quotaHit: Gemini's free-tier quota was reached partway through. You can resume once you're ready to continue -- nothing already processed is lost.

modelSelector.title: Extraction model
modelSelector.description: Choose which Gemini model analyzes your papers.

default.title: Default
default.description: Tries the newest, most capable model first, then automatically falls back to a faster or cheaper one if it runs out of quota mid-batch.
default.warning: The model used can change partway through the batch due to rate limits — check the "Model Used" column in the export to see what actually ran on each paper.

flash.title: gemini-3.5-flash
flash.description: The best balance of accuracy and speed. Recommended for most batches.

lite.title: gemini-3.1-flash-lite
lite.description: Fastest and cheapest, but more prone to reasoning mistakes such as layer order or internal consistency.

controls.title: Chart Title
controls.trendLineHint: Pick a numeric X axis (e.g. Sensitivity, Q-factor) to enable

workspace.title: Analysis workspace
workspace.pinHint: Click a point to pin an annotation

annotations.title: Annotations
annotations.empty: No pins yet — click any point on the chart to bookmark it for later comparison.

tooltips.groupBy: Colors points by this column so you can compare groups at a glance. Pick a low-cardinality field like Origin or Material Class.
tooltips.scale: Log scale keeps FOM values that span several orders of magnitude readable. Linear keeps equal spacing between values.
tooltips.median: Draws a dashed line at the median Y value of the points currently plotted.
tooltips.trendLine: Fits a straight line through the plotted points to show the overall trend. Only available when the X axis is a numeric column (e.g. Sensitivity, Q-factor) — a trend against a category like Material Class wouldn't mean anything.
